sections.markdown:
Changelog:
* v1.0: Initial setup including user details for query and function workaround.
* v2.0: Add user ID to the user details and to enable workflow workarounds and put rate card into lookup tables
* v2.1: Adding documentation and reorder cards for better understanding
* v3.0: Sync with Dashboard needs
* v3.1: Improve Documentation and ease of use to generate the user list
* v3.5: Sync with Dashboard adjustments
* v3.6: remove rate card lookup table

## Documentation
1. Ensure your user has the **CREATE Grail Lookup table permissions** [Lookup Documentation](https://docs.dynatrace.com/docs/discover-dynatrace/platform/grail/lookup-data#permissions)
2. Ensure all Dashboard **users have the READ Grail Lookup table permission**
3. Create a **list of users** with: user.email, user.id, dt.cost.costcenter, dt.cost.product (e.g. by using one of the helpful cards further down "Retrieve a list of active Dynatrace users" and export the result as CSV)
4. transform this list **into JSON** 
    AI can transform from CSV/Excel to JSON with the following AI prompt (please keep in mind our and your customer's AI policies)
    > Please convert the attached CSV into a downloadable JSON based on this JSON example:
    > {"user.email":"abc@de.fg",
    > "user.id":"00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000",
    > "dt.cost.costcenter":"a",
    > "dt.cost.product":"1"}
    
5. **Copy the JSON** into the *"Store user mapping within lookup table"* card & click run (you might need to click "show input")
6. **Adjust the prices** in the *"Store rate card within lookup table"* card & click run (you might need to click "show input")
7. Check the Dashboard :-)


You will find some helpful cards further down:
* Fetch already used cost centers or products
* Retrieve a list of active Dynatrace users
* See lookup rate card and user data content
* See all existing lookup tables
* Delete a lookup table

sections.title: Store user mapping within lookup table

input.value:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT"
| summarize count(), by: {dt.cost.costcenter}
| fieldsKeep dt.cost.costcenter

grail.canonicalQuery:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT"
| summarize by:{dt.cost.costcenter}, count()
| fieldsKeep dt.cost.costcenter
grail.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT"
| summarize count(), by: {dt.cost.costcenter}
| fieldsKeep dt.cost.costcenter

sections.title: Quickstart: Retrieve a list of active Dynatrace users

input.value:
fetch dt.system.events
  |filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT"
  |fields user.email, user.id
  |dedup user.email
  |filter endsWith(user.email,"dynatrace.com")
  | append [ 
    fetch dt.system.events
    |filter event.kind == "QUERY_EXECUTION_EVENT"
    |fields user.email, user.id
    |dedup user.email
    |filter endsWith(user.email,"dynatrace.com")
  ]
  |fieldsAdd dt.cost.costcenter="", dt.cost.product=""

details.errorMessage: `;` isn't allowed here. Please check the autocomplete suggestions before the error for alternative options.

  | append [ 
    fetch dt.system.events
    |filter event.kind == "QUERY_EXECUTION_EVENT"
    |fields user.email, user.id
    |dedup user.email
    |filter endsWith(user.email,"dynatrace.com")
  ]
  |fieldsAdd dt.cost.costcenter="", dt.cost.product="";
